name: plug-golf
description: Plug Golf — RNG closest-to-the-pin game for the Stake Engine web-sdk
//deps: Framework/runtime deps (svelte, pixi-svelte, @stake-engine/* state/utils packages, vite, storybook) are provided by the web-sdk monorepo workspace when this app lives under its apps/ dir. They are intentionally NOT pinned here — install by placing this folder in a web-sdk checkout and running pnpm install at the root.
